6-7. Planets, that are conjunct the major Lord will cause confinement and loss of wealth in their
sub periods. If, however, the major Lord is in an Angle, or in a Trine from the Ascendant,
there will be great happiness. If a planet conjunct 2, or more planets be in an inimical House,
in such sub period, only diseases, evils, quarrels and royal displeasures will come to pass.
8. In the sub period of a planet in the 7th from the Mooladasa Lord, death of wife, or the wifes
becoming a servant of an enemy, or getting attached to another man is denoted.
9-10. Death, destruction of wealth, or imprisonment will result in the sub period of the planet in
the 8th from the Moola Dasa Lord. If 2, or 3, or 4 malefics join in one House other than an
Angle, or a Trine, imprisonment, destruction and poverty will be the order of the sub period.
